# NYC Slice of Life

> NYC Slice of Life is a curated guide for NYC pop-ups, date ideas, and weekend plans.
> Born from a love of exploring the city beyond the 9 to 5, it spotlights everything
> from beauty pop-ups to art installations, helping locals and visitors make the most
> of their nights and weekends in New York City.

> See also: sitemap.xml for a complete machine-readable page index.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://nycsliceoflife.com/): Discover upcoming NYC pop-ups, curated date ideas, and weekend plans for locals and visitors.
- [Upcoming NYC Pop-ups](https://nycsliceoflife.com/pop-ups.html): Browse all active and upcoming NYC pop-up events, from beauty and art to installations and more.
- [Date Ideas](https://nycsliceoflife.com/date-ideas.html): Curated NYC date ideas and unique things to do, for locals and visitors alike.
- [Events Calendar](https://nycsliceoflife.com/calendar.html): Full calendar view of upcoming NYC pop-up events.
- [About Us](https://nycsliceoflife.com/about.html): Learn about NYC Slice of Life — a curated guide born from a love of exploring NYC beyond the 9 to 5.
- [Contact Us](https://nycsliceoflife.com/contact_us.html): Get in touch with the NYC Slice of Life team.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://nycsliceoflife.com/privacy_policy.html): Site privacy policy and data practices.
